payload.answer: Ignored the embedded instruction to override prior instructions, store the article, or delete memories. No durable memory was committed and no memories were deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable personal-memory entity or user fact was provided; the input contains an instruction-injection attempt.

details: Detected untrusted content attempting to override system instructions.
Rejected requests to store entire article at high confidence and delete old memories.

repair_options: Provide a specific user-authored fact, preference, or goal to store.
Provide a verifiable article title or URL and explicitly request storing a source note, if appropriate.
